name: Fiesta Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef until crumbly and drain fat.
2. Add onions, spinach, cumin, pepper, and parmesan to the pan with the browned beef.
3. In a separate pan, combine tomato soup and enchilada sauce. Simmer for ten minutes.
4. Combine tomato sauce and salsa in a bowl.
5. Dip one corn tortilla into the soup-enchilada mixture.
6. Fill the tortilla with 1/2 cup of meat and add 1 tablespoon of the salsa mixture.
7. Place seam-side down in a 3-quart casserole dish.
8. Repeat step 5 with the remaining tortillas, arranging them in the dish.
9. Sprinkle Monterey Jack cheese over the top.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
11. Serve topped with sour cream, sliced black olives, and green onions.
